concept: Hear / The Passive Reception of Sound
description: The passive, physical sense of perceiving sound. It is the simple reception of auditory vibration, without the necessary layer of mindful attention that defines listening.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'he' (life-breath, vitality) and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'open to the breath of life/sound.' This frames hearing as a fundamental, passive openness to the vibrations of the world, distinct from the active focus of 'sheno' (listen).
